explanation: Inserted quotes around the URL to test parsing behavior while maintaining the same execution outcome.
Reordered the flags '-split' and '-f' to test if the command still executes as expected under different argument sequences.
Used lowercase for the executable and flags to test case-insensitivity in detection mechanisms.
Omitted unnecessary whitespace after flags to test minimal formatting scenarios.
Used a variable to store the URL and expanded it in the command line to test path normalization and variable expansion bypasses.
